runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - AI semantic routing regression check on v8.11.131
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production deployment dpl_Fh3V7SSnGvFRuvHus9ieRRWidArA is Ready and aliased to https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
/api/version reports v8.11.131, commit b6414889fe777456bfd70f82582657571b310a50, and release pipeline 2517513574
Dashboard guest flow opened the AI sidebar with AI engine status Ready
Previously failing peak-load question returned load1 24h peak timestamp 2026-05-12 03:50, peak 16.58, average 9.08, and top servers
Previously failing omitted-server / whole-fleet 1분 load phrasing returned load1 24h peak timestamp 2026-05-12 03:50 and top server db-mysql-dc1-primary 16.58
Previously failing CPU-excluded / 시스템 load / 제일 버거웠던 때 phrasing returned load1 24h peak timestamp 2026-05-12 03:50 and culprit servers
Advice-only load phrasing did not return the deterministic peak timestamp, so the immediate peak false-positive was avoided
Composite peak-plus-response-guidance query routed to /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 with localRouteDecision complexity_below_threshold and missed deterministic peak evidence
Browser console reported 0 warnings and 0 errors; AI API network calls returned 200/201
skippedSurfaces: Full five-question conversational AI QA was not repeated to avoid unnecessary live LLM cost; this run targeted semantic routing regressions only
Core route pack beyond landing/dashboard AI sidebar

aiLatencyObservations.surface: AI sidebar omitted-server whole-fleet 1분 load peak question
AI sidebar CPU-excluded system-load peak question
AI sidebar composite load peak plus response guidance question

plannerShadowObservations.source: Three prior fragile peak-load phrasings stayed grounded to load1/24h whole-fleet peak evidence.

plannerShadowObservations.surface: Composite load peak plus response guidance question
plannerShadowObservations.source: Prompt contained load + 피크 + 최근 하루 but local route decision stayed complexity_below_threshold and the answer omitted the deterministic 24h peak timestamp.

expertAssessments.rationale: The known fragile peak-load questions now pass, but a composite load peak plus response-guidance prompt still bypasses deterministic peak evidence and returns a generic streaming answer.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Route explicit metric_peak frames and raw semantic peak evidence before generic streaming for composite advice prompts.

expertAssessments.rationale: The advice-only load question avoided peak false-positive routing, but the response included potentially mutating operational commands without a deterministic evidence/safety envelope.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Add a safe ops-advice evidence path or output guard that separates diagnosis, read-only verification, and mutating commands.

expertAssessments.rationale: The production deployment is Ready, /api/version matches v8.11.131, GitLab release pipeline succeeded, and Vercel usage remains within the no-billed-usage guardrail.
The run used a small risk-based Playwright MCP prompt set with request, runtime, console, and timing evidence instead of broad live LLM repetition.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after v8.11.131 targeted semantic routing QA; effective 6.7213 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 6090.

completedImprovements.title: Previously failing Korean peak-load phrasings stay grounded to load1 24h whole-fleet evidence on v8.11.131

pendingImprovements.title: Composite load peak plus response-guidance prompt should still use deterministic peak evidence
pendingImprovements.note: The prompt '최근 하루 load 피크 시간과 대응 방법 알려줘' routed to /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 as complexity_below_threshold and omitted the deterministic load1 24h peak timestamp.

pendingImprovements.title: Load advice responses should not propose mutating commands without a safety envelope
pendingImprovements.note: The prompt '최근 하루 load 높아서 힘들 때 조치 방법 알려줘' avoided peak false-positive routing but suggested system/runtime command changes without deterministic validation.
